reviews.comment:
Se supone q deben de dar el ejemplo y andan con vehiculos rotos, sin luces, sin patente, y lleno de gente la caja de carga..
ES ILEGAL SEÑORES!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They're supposed to set an example, and they're driving around with broken-down vehicles, no lights, no license plates, and the back of the car full of people...
IT'S ILLEGAL, GENTLEMEN!!!!
